issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' not 'Activated'. This is a Counter ability activated during battle.
Duration should be 'DuringThisBattle' not 'EndOfBattle'. Card text says 'during this battle'.

Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and GiveDon action is incorrect. The DON!! cost is part of the Counter activation cost, not a separate effect. Should be removed or merged into activation cost specification.
